top_signals.title: Aluminum Slumps as Iran Peace Deal Softens Blow of Supply Crisis
top_signals.summary: Aluminum slumped to the lowest in more than two months as an interim agreement between the US and Iran laid the groundwork for the resumption of metal shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: These 4 stocks could be major winners from falling oil prices
top_signals.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Montreal Transit System REM to Sell Around C$2 Billion Bonds
top_signals.summary: Réseau express métropolitain (REM), an automated light metro system in Greater Montreal, is looking to raise around C$2 billion ($1.43 million) in a bond sale as soon as this week, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
